reason: Independent adversarial review placed the producing commit on HOLD before any result was retrieved or promoted.
hold_findings: The finite quotient induction was only conditionally sound: the producer self-attested, rather than machine-certified, that its canonical bytes were Markov-sufficient for the exact loaded deterministic kernel.
The scientific-result validator did not reconcile the exact ordered tape and certificate identities across prepared seeds, checkpoints, result transducers, coverage rows and the runner manifest.
Retrieval verification checksum-protected execution receipts but did not semantically reconcile their commit, command, output and environment claims.

termination.why: Conserve VPS compute after proof invalidation.

next_gate: Repair all HOLD findings, freeze a new immutable commit, repeat reduced-horizon and W24 certification, retrieve and independently audit the new artifacts.
